name: Goodrich Castle & Coppet Hill
terrain: Field paths, woodland, grassy ridge, lanes
highlights: Ruined Norman castle and dramatic ridge high above the River Wye.
points_of_interest: Goodrich Castle (English Heritage); Kerne Bridge (Victorian); Flanesford Priory
viewpoints: Coppet Hill trig point; Symonds Yat in distance
food_drink_nearby: Cross Keys Goodrich; Ye Olde Ferrie Inne Symonds Yat West
hazards_notes: English side; castle has entry fee unless EH member
